summary: Tested redesigned ConfiguraciĂłn module: backend resumen/reordenar/clonar/export/import + frontend Resumen tab, modals (Camposâ†’CatĂˇlogo vinculado, Desempatesâ†’Fuente), reorder buttons, search, header actions. 11/11 new config tests pass; 38/39 regression tests pass (1 stale assertion unrelated to this feature). Frontend flows all confirmed working.

minor.issue: Pre-existing regression test asserts admin email 'lcorreaq@krinos.gov.co' but actual seed value is 'lcorreaq@gmail.com' (per test_credentials.md). Update assertion or seed. Not related to current iteration.

issues: A catalogo row labeled '17548fd7' (a UUID-prefix) appears, suggesting fallback to id when 'nombre' is missing. Likely from pre-existing test data (TEST_Cat_*). Consider hiding TEST_/ orphan catalogos with no nombre or showing a clearer placeholder.

action_items: (Optional) Update backend_test.py::TestAuth::test_login_success to assert lcorreaq@gmail.com (current seed) or align seed_admin to original email.

(Optional polish) On Resumen 'VinculaciĂłn' panel, fallback rendering shows raw catalogo id ('17548fd7') for a residual TEST_ entry without name; consider filtering catalogos without 'nombre' or labeling them as 'sin nombre'.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: routes_config.py clone correctly remaps catalogo_id from sourceâ†’target ids. Verified by creating a campo with catalogo_id in source then cloning; target campo references new catalogo id.

Backend: 'agregar' mode correctly skips duplicates by nombre_interno (campos) / nombre (catalogos/criterios). Desempates lack uniqueness key so re-clone duplicates them â€” confirm if this is intended.
Backend: resumen tolerant decoding handles legacy 'criterio:<nombre>' and bare nombre_interno desempate refs (fuentes set was non-empty in INC2026 seed).
Frontend: SortableTable provides data-testid='move-up-<uuid>' and title='Mover arriba' â€” good for automated testing. Disabled state on first/last row works correctly.
Frontend: After reorder, server response is persisted (verified via page reload).
CatĂˇlogo dropdown appears only when tipo in ('lista','seleccion_multiple') as expected.
Frontend Clonar modal correctly bundles toggles for campos/catalogos/criterios/desempates and modo (agregar/reemplazar).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Resumen, modals, reorder, search, header actions all verified)

test_credentials: Admin: username=lcorreaq, password=Chocolate2026! (login OK via /api/auth/login â†’ access_token).
seed_data_creation: Tests create temporary convocatorias (TEST_/IMP prefixes) and clean them up via DELETE. One transient TEST_vinc_campo_* is created in source INC2026 to validate catalogo_id remap; not cleaned (harmless, low orden, would be filtered by name filter).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite has one stale assertion in TestAuth::test_login_success (email mismatch). The new test_config_module.py covers resumen, reordenar (campos/criterios/desempates), clonar (same-id 400, source-not-found 404, agregarâ†’skips duplicates, catalogo_id remap), and export/import (shape, roundtrip remap, invalid version). For frontend reorder testing use button[title="Mover arriba"]:not([disabled]) or [data-testid^=move-up-]. Login uses 2 plain inputs on the root page; submit button text 'Ingresar'.
rca of the issue: N/A â€” no blocking issues found in this iteration.
